description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a predominantly pink and black camouflage pattern covering most of its metal and polymer surfaces. The rifle features a short barrel with a small cylindrical muzzle device, a prominent magazine well with a curved detachable box magazine, and a collapsible metal stock with a black polymer buttplate. The receiver and handguard are adorned with a digital or abstract camouflage, while the grip and magazine share the same pattern. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, and the overall design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver, and the charging handle is visible on the left side. The rifle's construction suggests a blend of steel, aluminum, and polymer components for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, pink and black camouflaged submachine gun-style rifle with a collapsible stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, collapsible stock, curved magazine, and camouflage pattern.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, iron front sight, and narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine release, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttplate of the collapsible stock and the alignment of the iron sights.
